functions.name: sf__get_leads
functions.description: Get the 5 most recent Leads from Salesforce. Returns lead name, company, email, phone, status, and lead source.

functions.name: sf__create_lead
functions.description: Create a new Lead in Salesforce. Requires last_name and company at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 leads.

functions.name: sf__update_lead
functions.description: Update an existing Lead in Salesforce by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 leads.

functions.name: sf__get_opportunities
functions.description: Get the 5 most recent Opportunities from Salesforce. Returns opportunity name, account, stage, amount, close date, and probability.

functions.name: sf__create_opportunity
functions.description: Create a new Opportunity in Salesforce. Requires name, stage, and close_date at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 opportunities.

functions.name: sf__update_opportunity
functions.description: Update an existing Opportunity in Salesforce by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 opportunities.

functions.name: sf__get_accounts
functions.description: Get the latest 5 Accounts from Salesforce. Returns company name, industry, phone, website, and employee count.

functions.name: sf__create_account
functions.description: Create a new Account in Salesforce. Requires name at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 accounts.

functions.name: sf__update_account
functions.description: Update an existing Account in Salesforce by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 accounts.

functions.name: sf__get_contacts
functions.description: Get the latest 5 Contacts from Salesforce. Returns first name, last name, email, phone, title, and associated account.

functions.name: sf__create_contact
functions.description: Create a new Contact in Salesforce. Requires last_name at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 contacts.

functions.name: sf__update_contact
functions.description: Update an existing Contact in Salesforce by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 contacts.

functions.name: sf__create_lead_form
functions.description: Opens a form to create a new Salesforce Lead. The user fills in details and submits.

functions.name: sf__create_account_form
functions.description: Opens a form to create a new Salesforce Account. The user fills in details and submits.

functions.name: sf__create_contact_form
functions.description: Opens a form to create a new Salesforce Contact. The user fills in details and submits.

functions.name: sn__get_incidents
functions.description: Retrieve the latest incidents from ServiceNow. Returns up to 'limit' incidents (default 5), ordered by creation date descending. Use sysparm_display_value=true to get human-readable field values.

functions.name: sn__get_requests
functions.description: Retrieve the latest service requests from ServiceNow. Returns up to 'limit' requests (default 5), ordered by creation date descending.

functions.name: sn__get_request_items
functions.description: Retrieve request items for a specific service request. request_sys_id is the sys_id of the parent sc_request record. This tool is called from the widget when expanding a request row.

functions.name: sn__create_incident
functions.description: Create a new incident in ServiceNow. Requires short_description. Optional: description, priority (1-4), category.

functions.name: sn__create_request
functions.description: Create a new service request in ServiceNow. Requires short_description. Optional: description, priority (1-4). Does not create request items.

functions.name: sn__update_incident
functions.description: Update an existing incident in ServiceNow. Requires sys_id. Editable fields: description, priority.

functions.name: sn__update_request
functions.description: Update an existing service request in ServiceNow. Requires sys_id. Editable field: approval.

functions.name: sn__update_request_item
functions.description: Update an existing request item in ServiceNow. Requires sys_id. Editable field: quantity.

functions.name: sn__resolve_incident
functions.description: Resolve an incident in ServiceNow by setting state to Resolved. Requires close_code and close_notes.

functions.name: sn__add_work_note
functions.description: Add a work note to an existing incident in ServiceNow. Work notes are internal comments visible only to IT staff.

functions.name: sn__get_knowledge_articles
functions.description: Search knowledge articles in ServiceNow. Returns articles from the kb_knowledge table matching the query. Useful for finding solutions before creating incidents.

functions.name: sn__create_incident_form
functions.description: Opens a form to create a new ServiceNow Incident. The user fills in details and submits.

functions.name: sn__create_request_form
functions.description: Opens a form to create a new ServiceNow Request. The user fills in details and submits.

functions.name: sap__get_purchase_orders
functions.description: Fetch the latest purchase orders from SAP S/4HANA. Returns PO number, supplier, purchasing org, date, and deletion code.

functions.name: sap__get_business_partners
functions.description: Fetch business partners from SAP S/4HANA. Returns partner ID, full name, category, and organization name.

functions.name: sap__get_materials
functions.description: Fetch materials master data from SAP S/4HANA. Returns product ID, type, group, and base unit.

functions.name: sap__create_purchase_order
functions.description: Create a new Purchase Order in SAP S/4HANA. Requires supplier and purchasing_org. Returns the updated list of latest purchase orders.

functions.name: sap__update_purchase_order
functions.description: Update an existing Purchase Order in SAP S/4HANA by its PO number. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest purchase orders.

functions.name: sap__get_material_details
functions.description: Get detailed information about a specific material from SAP S/4HANA. Returns all available fields for the material.

functions.name: hs__get_emails
functions.description: Get the latest marketing emails from HubSpot with performance stats. This is the entry point — the widget handles drill-down to lists and contacts.

functions.name: hs__get_lists
functions.description: Get contact lists from HubSpot. Called by the widget for drill-down navigation.

functions.name: hs__get_list_contacts
functions.description: Get contacts in a specific list. Called by the widget when drilling into a list.

functions.name: hs__add_to_list
functions.description: Add a contact to a static list by email. Called by the widget.

functions.name: hs__remove_from_list
functions.description: Remove a contact from a static list. Called by the widget.

functions.name: hs__update_email
functions.description: Update a marketing email's name or subject. Called by the widget.

functions.name: hs__update_list
functions.description: Update a list's name. Called by the widget.

functions.name: hs__get_contacts
functions.description: Get the latest 5 Contacts from HubSpot CRM. Returns name, email, phone, company, and lifecycle stage.

functions.name: hs__create_contact
functions.description: Create a new Contact in HubSpot CRM. Requires email at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 contacts.

functions.name: hs__update_contact
functions.description: Update an existing Contact in HubSpot CRM by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 contacts.

functions.name: hs__get_deals
functions.description: Get the latest 5 Deals from HubSpot CRM. Returns deal name, stage, amount, close date, and pipeline.

functions.name: hs__create_deal
functions.description: Create a new Deal in HubSpot CRM. Requires deal_name at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 deals.

functions.name: hs__create_contact_form
functions.description: Opens a form to create a new HubSpot Contact. The user fills in details and submits.

functions.name: hs__create_deal_form
functions.description: Opens a form to create a new HubSpot Deal. The user fills in details and submits.

functions.name: ft__get_flights_by_aircraft
functions.description: Retrieve flight history for an aircraft by its ICAO 24-bit transponder address. icao24 must be a 6-character lowercase hex string (e.g. '3c675a'). Date range must not exceed 2 days. Current-day and recent historical flights are available.

functions.name: ft__get_aircraft_state
functions.description: Get the last known live state of an aircraft: position, altitude, speed, heading. icao24 must be a 6-character lowercase hex string (e.g. '3c675a').

functions.name: ft__get_airport_departures
functions.description: Retrieve flights departing from an airport within a date range. airport must be an ICAO airport code (e.g. 'EGLL' for Heathrow, 'KJFK' for JFK). Date range must not exceed 1 day.

functions.name: ft__get_airport_arrivals
functions.description: Retrieve flights arriving at an airport within a date range. airport must be an ICAO airport code (e.g. 'EGLL' for Heathrow, 'KJFK' for JFK). Date range must not exceed 1 day. Use yesterday's date — same-day arrival data is not yet available.

functions.name: ft__get_aircraft_track
functions.description: Get the flight track (waypoints) for an aircraft. icao24 must be a 6-character lowercase hex string (e.g. '3c675a'). time is a Unix timestamp within the flight's time window; pass 0 for most recent track.

functions.name: ds__get_envelopes
functions.description: Get the latest envelopes from DocuSign. Optional filters: from_date (ISO 8601), status (sent|delivered|completed|declined|voided), count (default 10).

functions.name: ds__get_envelope_details
functions.description: Get detailed information about a specific envelope including recipients and their signing status.

functions.name: ds__get_templates
functions.description: List available DocuSign templates. Returns template name, description, and ID.

functions.name: ds__send_envelope
functions.description: Send a new envelope for signing. Requires template_id, subject, and signers (list of {name, email, role_name}). Returns envelope ID and status.

functions.name: ds__void_envelope
functions.description: Void (cancel) an envelope. Requires envelope_id and void_reason.

functions.name: ds__resend_envelope
functions.description: Resend notifications for an envelope to recipients who haven't signed yet.

functions.name: ds__get_signing_url
functions.description: Generate an embedded signing URL for a recipient. Requires envelope_id, signer_name, signer_email, and a return_url.

functions.name: ds__download_document
functions.description: Download a document from an envelope. Pass document_id='combined' for all documents as one PDF.

functions.name: ds__send_envelope_form
functions.description: Opens a form to send a new DocuSign envelope. The user fills in recipient details and submits.
